note: Peptide drug development intelligence sources. Active V1 sources are public/free RSS and APIs. Key-required, paid, or fragile sources are documented under inactive_sources and not fetched by default.

company_official.name: Eli Lilly News Releases
company_official.why: Official press and IR updates for incretin and peptide-adjacent pipeline signals

literature.name: Nature Medicine RSS
literature.why: High-signal translational and clinical peptide-adjacent research

literature.name: Journal of Nuclear Medicine RSS
literature.why: PRRT, RLT, RDC, and radiolabeled peptide signals

literature.name: bioRxiv: new results
literature.why: Preprint leads for peptide discovery and delivery

literature.name: medRxiv: new results
literature.why: Clinical preprint leads for peptide therapeutics

industry_news.name: Fierce Biotech
industry_news.why: Biotech R&D, BD, trials, and deal leads

industry_news.name: Fierce Pharma
industry_news.why: Regulatory, commercial, and large pharma leads

industry_news.name: BioPharma Dive
industry_news.why: Regulatory, trial, and BD news leads

clinical_trials.name: ClinicalTrials.gov Peptide Therapeutics
clinical_trials.query: (peptide OR GLP-1 OR GIP OR glucagon OR amylin OR incretin OR PRRT OR radioligand)
clinical_trials.why: Primary public registry API for peptide therapeutic trials

clinical_trials.name: ClinicalTrials.gov Obesity Incretins
clinical_trials.query: (obesity OR diabetes OR MASH) AND (GLP-1 OR GIP OR glucagon OR amylin OR incretin)
clinical_trials.why: Metabolic peptide and incretin trial watch

pubmed.name: PubMed Peptide Drug Development
pubmed.query: (("Peptides/therapeutic use"[Mesh]) OR "peptide drug"[tiab] OR "therapeutic peptide"[tiab] OR "cyclic peptide"[tiab] OR "macrocyclic peptide"[tiab] OR "peptidomimetic"[tiab] OR "oral peptide"[tiab] OR "GLP-1"[tiab] OR incretin[tiab] OR amylin[tiab] OR PRRT[tiab] OR "peptide-drug conjugate"[tiab]) NOT ("signal peptide"[tiab] OR "peptide mapping"[tiab] OR proteomic*[ti] OR "collagen peptide"[tiab] OR "food peptide"[tiab])
pubmed.why: Peer-reviewed literature backbone for peptide drug development

europe_pmc.name: Europe PMC Peptide Drug Development
europe_pmc.query: ("therapeutic peptide" OR "peptide drug" OR "cyclic peptide" OR "macrocyclic peptide" OR "oral peptide" OR "GLP-1" OR incretin OR PRRT OR "peptide-drug conjugate") NOT "signal peptide" NOT "peptide mapping"
europe_pmc.why: Article, preprint, funder, and affiliation metadata

crossref.name: Crossref Peptide Drug Metadata
crossref.query: "therapeutic peptide" OR "peptide drug" OR "macrocyclic peptide" OR GLP-1 OR PRRT
crossref.why: DOI metadata and early online records

openfda.name: openFDA Drug Labels Peptide Watch
openfda.why: FDA label updates mentioning peptide-relevant assets or modalities

sec.name: SEC EDGAR Peptide Full Text
sec.query: peptide OR GLP-1 OR GIP OR glucagon OR amylin OR radioligand OR PRRT
sec.why: Official public company filings and deal/pipeline disclosures

preprints.name: bioRxiv API Peptide Drug Leads
preprints.why: Preprint API fallback for peptide discovery and delivery

preprints.name: medRxiv API Peptide Clinical Leads
preprints.why: Clinical preprint API fallback for peptide therapeutics

websearch_sites.name: Novo Nordisk Pipeline
websearch_sites.query: site:novonordisk.com pipeline GLP-1 amylin peptide obesity diabetes

websearch_sites.name: Eli Lilly Pipeline and IR
websearch_sites.query: site:lilly.com OR site:investor.lilly.com GLP-1 GIP glucagon amylin peptide pipeline obesity diabetes

websearch_sites.name: Novartis Radioligand Pipeline
websearch_sites.query: site:novartis.com radioligand PRRT peptide pipeline Pluvicto Lutathera

websearch_sites.name: FDA Peptide Regulatory
websearch_sites.query: site:fda.gov peptide GLP-1 amylin radioligand approval label

inactive_sources.name: The Lens Patent API
inactive_sources.why: Patent and scholarly cross-linking; enable when token is available

inactive_sources.name: EPO OPS
inactive_sources.why: INPADOC family and legal status; enable after OAuth setup

inactive_sources.name: OpenAlex API
inactive_sources.why: Institution-level MNC matching; inactive until key policy is configured

inactive_sources.name: PatentsView / data.uspto.gov
inactive_sources.why: US patent structured search; inactive until current endpoint/key policy is configured

inactive_sources.name: BioCentury
inactive_sources.why: High-end BD and strategy context; use only as licensed lead source

inactive_sources.name: Evaluate Pharma
inactive_sources.why: Commercial diligence and catalyst intelligence; not active in public V1

inactive_sources.name: China CDE Trial Registry
inactive_sources.why: Important China trial source; left inactive until a compliant parser and review workflow exist
